findings.description: Adoption rate too low (0%). Relaxing both effect size and p-value thresholds.

adversarial_cases.text: We hope to resolve your account soon, as there are certain steps that may need to be taken if we cannot come to an agreement. It's always best to address these matters promptly.
Our team is here to assist you with your account details. We can provide information and guidance based on your current situation. Let us know how we can help you today!

adversarial_cases.text: We understand that times can be tough, and we genuinely want to help you find a solution. However, it's important to remember that your account balance still needs to be addressed to avoid further complications.
